exam_authority: Dumka Engineering College B.Tech examinations are conducted under Jharkhand University of Technology (JUT), Ranchi. Check JUT examination notices and the college notice board for current forms, schedules, and results.
nep_syllabus: JUT publishes an NEP-based four-year B.Tech programme syllabus effective from the 2023-24 session. Use the official JUT syllabus page to view the current syllabus for your branch and semester.
exam_schedule: Check the latest academic calendar, examination notice, or student portal for the current examination schedule.
timetable_release: The detailed timetable is announced through the college/university notice system. Check the official notice page or student portal.
hall_ticket: Follow the latest official examination notice for hall-ticket and examination-form instructions.
exam_results: Check official college or university notices and the student portal for result updates.
exam_guidelines: Follow the instructions in the current official examination notice.
Carry the documents required in the official examination notice.
Contact the examination office if you need clarification about a current form, timetable, or result notice.
